MINKY is a dog theme meme ​token on Base. A very loveable ​character in our humble ​opinion and has real potential.



HE is the kind of puppy who ​thinks every shoe is a chew ​toy and every squirrel is a ​personal trainer. He's ​convinced the world ​revolves around belly rubs, ​and honestly, he might be ​right.
